headline: A Look At Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) Valuation After Guidance Cut And Activist And Legal Scrutiny
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) is under pressure after its first quarter update, where a reduced full year adjusted EPS outlook coincided with a sharp share price drop, legal investigations, and fresh activist scrutiny. See our latest analysis for Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings. The first quarter guidance cut came on top of a share price that has already been under pressure, with a 1 month share price return of down 24.47% and a year to date share price return of down 30.07%. headline: Oceania Holiday Expansion Puts Norwegian Cruise Line’s Premium Thesis To Test
summary: Oceania Cruises, part of Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NYSE:NCLH), has released its 2026-27 and 2027-28 holiday and New Year luxury voyage lineup. The program features expanded seasonal sailings across global regions and introduces itineraries on new ships Oceania Sonata and Oceania Aurelia. The voyages focus on premium holiday experiences for upscale guests, with a range of exclusive on board and destination offerings.
